_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Contract / No-5xx Route Sweep + schemathesis Fuzzing

steps.description: Implement the contract test layer: (1) tests/dashboard/test_route_contract_sweep.py — enumerate create_app().routes, request every GET/HEAD route (TestClient with raise_server_exceptions=False) against a seeded testcontainer db_session, assert status_code < 500, parametrized one case per route, with a documented skip set (SSE/streaming, static mount), path-param resolution from seeded data, an UNRESOLVED assertion, and an EXPECTED_5XX xfail allowlist (each genuine 5xx gets a TODO(file-incident) placeholder for operator follow-up — never a production-code fix, never an incident package created in-worktree). (2) tests/dashboard/test_schemathesis_contract.py — schemathesis OpenAPI fuzzing of the JSON API operations (those whose OpenAPI response declares application/json — keep-alive API, runtime-overrides, JSON job endpoints — not HTML/htmx routes), marked contract_fuzz. (3) Add schemathesis to dev deps + regenerate uv.lock; register the contract_fuzz marker and add it to the addopts -m exclusion. (4) Makefile targets test-route-sweep + test-contract-fuzz. (5) .github/workflows/contract-fuzz.yml — nightly cron + workflow_dispatch, runs make test-contract-fuzz, continue-on-error during burn-in. (6) Update docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md, skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md (+ iw sync-skills --force), and ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md (item 3.2 DONE + changelog). Demonstrate each new test can fail via a throwaway 5xx route registered on the test app (no production code touched) and record it as tdd_red_evidence. Test-only CR — no production code may be edited. 2400s timeout.

Per-agent review of S01: scope discipline (no production code edited, no throwaway 5xx route left behind in the test files), AC1 route-sweep correctness (raise_server_exceptions=False, status_code < 500, parametrized, SSE skipped), AC3 marker exclusion verified via --collect-only, AC4 nightly-only workflow triggers, AC5 EXPECTED_5XX entries carry TODO(file-incident) placeholders + xfail + operator follow-up, AC6 docs/skill/plan updated and .claude/skills copy byte-identical. Confirm tdd_red_evidence records the deliberate-break demonstration. Pre-review lint+format+test-assertions gate must show zero new violations.

Global cross-agent review of S01..S02: every AC (AC1-AC6) verified end-to-end; scope integrity (git diff origin/main -- dashboard/ orch/ is empty — no production edit, no throwaway route left behind); skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md canonical QV-gate list NOT modified (no new gate — scope creep check); contract_fuzz exclusion independently verified via --collect-only; uv.lock consistent with the schemathesis constraint; TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md changelog counts match the S01 report. Runs the full unit + integration suites — make test-integration executes the new route sweep; a failure there is CRITICAL.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Integration tests — runs the new route-contract sweep

Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill. Note the EXPECTED_5XX allowlist size, whether S09 (integration-tests) needed fix cycles from latent route failures, whether the contract_fuzz exclusion held, and any TODO(file-incident) placeholders raised for genuine 5xx.
